meta.note: [provenance:reference-impl-aligned §6.10 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION] A single-target ［＃「X」は中見出し］ whose X is absent from the preceding text is self-contained: the quoted run is itself the heading text, rendered as a visible inline aozora-heading-hint span (no block <hN>, valid mid-line) and never promoted to a block heading. Serialize byte-exact (§7.6). Bytes from the reference parser.
